author: doll-agent
content:
Done. Added kernels/simd_i32.rs and kernels/simd_i64.rs with 12 binary kernels (add/sub/mul wrapping + bitand/bitor/bitxor for each).

Pulp's cross-platform Simd trait doesn't expose generic integer arithmetic - only per-backend methods. Took the auto-vectorization approach via tight scalar loops with linear access, which LLVM turns into target-appropriate SIMD. Matches numpy's loops_arithmetic.dispatch.c.src approach (compiler-driven, not intrinsic-driven).

12 tests covering basic ops, partial tails, overflow wrapping, bitwise patterns. ferray-ufunc: 12 new tests, all passing, clippy clean.
